summary: Translation Feature Testing Complete - All three languages (English, Spanish, Portuguese) are working correctly across the application. Login page, Dashboard, Sidebar navigation, Settings page, and Translation Editor all display properly translated text.
passed_tests: Login page displays correctly in English with all labels translated
Login page displays correctly in Spanish (Correo electrónico, Contraseña, Iniciar Sesión)
Login page displays correctly in Portuguese (E-mail, Senha, Entrar)
Language switcher in header works correctly - switches between EN/ES/PT
Dashboard shows all text translated in Spanish (Panel, Estado de SLA, A Tiempo, En Riesgo, Vencido)
Dashboard shows all text translated in Portuguese (Painel, Status de SLA, No Prazo, Em Risco, Vencido)

Sidebar navigation items fully translated in Spanish (Mis Servicios, Crear Nueva Solicitud, Reportar un Problema, Ribbon de Oportunidades, Todos los Pedidos, Tickets Eliminados, Reportes, Configuración)

Sidebar navigation items fully translated in Portuguese (Meus Serviços, Criar Nova Solicitação, Reportar um Problema, Ribbon de Oportunidades, Todos os Pedidos, Tickets Excluídos, Relatórios, Configurações)
Settings page shows Translation Editor option with correct description
Translation Editor page loads correctly at /settings/translations
Translation Editor allows selecting Spanish or Portuguese language
Translation Editor search functionality works correctly
Translation Editor displays English reference and target translation side by side
SLA Status cards display translated labels (On Track/A Tiempo/No Prazo, At Risk/En Riesgo/Em Risco, Breached/Vencido/Vencido)
All KPI cards show translated labels (Open/Abierto/Aberto, In Progress/En Progreso/Em Andamento, Delivered/Entregado/Entregue)
critical_code_review_comments: Translation files are comprehensive with 700+ keys each covering all UI elements
New translation keys added: nav.reportIssue, nav.opportunityRibbon, nav.deletedTickets - all working correctly
Dashboard hardcoded strings replaced with t() function calls - verified working
Translation Editor page created at /settings/translations - allows admins to review/edit translations
Language switcher persists selection across page navigation
All sidebar navigation items use labelKey for translations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation feature fully tested. All three languages (English, Spanish, Portuguese) working correctly. Translation Editor page at /settings/translations allows admins to review and edit translations. Language switcher in header works correctly. All dashboard KPIs, SLA status cards, and sidebar navigation items are properly translated.
